changes.before: Eastweald had not gone wild.
changes.after: Eastweald had been kept.

changes.before: Roads were kept clear. Ditches had been cut back. Dead orchards stood in disciplined rows with their lower limbs trimmed, sight lines opened through bark the color of old bone. Even the empty stretches looked tended.
changes.after: Roads stayed clear. Ditches had been cut back. Dead orchards stood in hard rows with their lower limbs trimmed for sightlines.

changes.before: They had become quick in the way only repetition bought.
changes.after: Repetition had made them quick.

changes.before: From a distance it was only one more piece of country failing badly. Up close it had the tidy emptiness of a place abandoned by people who expected to come back and then chose not to.
changes.after: From a distance it was one more ruin. Up close it had the tidy emptiness of a place left by people who had expected to return.

changes.before: The bandage had gone wet already. The wound burned in time with the mare's stride. Jaina rode close enough to keep one eye on it and far enough not to make a show of the fact.
changes.after: The bandage had already gone wet. Jaina rode close enough to watch it and far enough not to make a show of it.

changes.before: Her side hurt. The day had burned more time than she liked. Every delay now had Lyriel's next meal, Cyndia's next watch, Jaina's next spell, her own blood, all priced inside it.
changes.after: Her side hurt. Every delay now came priced in food, watch rotations, spellwork, blood.

changes.before: Mass work. Not tainted bread. Not one more dead hamlet waiting to tip. Something closer to the hand on the lever.
changes.after: They worked here in force.

changes.before: The half-collapsed lean-to on the west side where a patient man could hide three archers and a box of trouble.
changes.after: A half-collapsed lean-to on the west side where a patient man could hide trouble.

changes.before: Three cloudy bottles. One intact. One shattered under a chair. One stoppered with wax impressed by a seal that had smeared before it cooled.
changes.after: Three cloudy bottles: one intact, one shattered under a chair, one stoppered with wax and a smeared seal.

changes.before: there was the hunger she mistrusted more than fear

The air changed around her without flash or drama. Heat shimmered low over the flagstones while the rest of the room stayed cold. Frost climbed the edge of the broken bottle and stopped there, indecisive. The small hairs at the back of Sylvanas's neck rose.
changes.after: The air changed around her without flash. Heat shimmered low over the flagstones while the rest of the room stayed cold. Frost crept up the broken bottle and stopped.

changes.before: Minutes in a place like that were counted differently. Not by the clock. By how long a hostile country tolerated your stillness.
changes.after: Sylvanas counted breaths.

changes.before: Good. She sounded angry. Anger moved people faster than fear if they knew what to do with it.
Not a rear room. Enough confusion to leave by.
The wound burned in time with the mare's stride... Lyriel kept checking behind them with the alert, impatient tilt that meant she would rather be shooting than leaving.
changes.after: The bandage had already gone wet... Lyriel kept checking behind them.

changes.before: Immediate. Flat. Certain. Sylvanas disliked it on the spot.
changes.after: Flat. Certain. Sylvanas disliked it.

changes.before: She hated being touched like that in the field. It made caution feel like a hand on the reins.
changes.after: A touch like that made caution feel like a hand on the reins.

changes.before: The shock of absence hit harder than any scream would have.
That was the ugliest part. The field demanded the living answer first and did not care what it had already taken.
changes.after: No time for the missing. The field asked for the living answer first.

changes.before: The absence in the formation had weight now. Not grief exactly. Geometry. A shape ruined by subtraction.
changes.after: The absence in the formation had weight now. A shape ruined by subtraction.

changes.before: Thin file. Weak file. One more page in it.
road grime dulling everything that usually looked clean on him by force of habit
changes.after: road grime dulling what habit usually kept clean

changes.before: Lor'themar listened the way he always had, weighing each fragment before the next one landed.
changes.after: Lor'themar listened the way he always had, weighing each fragment before the next.

changes.before: Professional. Clean. Wrong in every way that mattered and necessary in all the others.
changes.after: Professional. Clean. Wrong. Necessary.

changes.before: "Binding sequence," she said. "Part of one. No— the retaining shape. The part meant to survive handling."
changes.after: "Binding work," she said. "Part of a larger shape. This section was built to survive handling."

changes.before: "This isn't passive contamination. It's mass work. I can feel the shape of it even from here."
changes.after: "This isn't spillover. They worked here in force. I can feel the shape of it from the yard."

changes.before: "The body isn't only carrying it... They're teaching the flesh something and waiting for death to finish the sentence."
changes.after: "The body isn't only carrying it... They're teaching the flesh how to answer, then waiting for death to finish it."

changes.before: "I can give you the binding run and the host answer. I lost the trigger."
changes.after: "I can give you what keeps it alive through storage and baking. I lost the last turn."

changes.before: "There was a route notation under the reagent shelf. Not Andorhal district code. Estate code. North-east approach, private stores, limited labor rotation. Big enough to matter."
changes.after: "There was a marking under the reagent shelf. Estate road, not Andorhal town use. Northeast approach. Private stores. Short labor rotation. Big enough to matter."

changes.before: "The farmhouse and the compound use the same retaining family, but the compound's perimeter work is cleaner and much better funded. That means more than one site, more than one labor lane, and someone upstream standardizing the method."
changes.after: "The farmhouse and the compound use the same family of binding. The compound's edge work is cleaner and better funded. More than one site. More than one labor crew. Someone upstream is making the method match."

changes.before: "Methodology review," Jaina said. "The Council wants the evidence chain formalized before they commit resources at scale."
changes.after: "The Council wants the proof laid out clean before they'll move resources in force," Jaina said.

changes.before: "And if your two institutions are both collapsing into process, Arthas becomes a lever whether we like him or not."
changes.after: "And if both your institutions keep turning inward, Arthas becomes a lever whether we like him or not."

flags: Canon check passed: Eastweald/Andorhal/Hearthglen/Barov geography and Arthas-Jaina plague timing remain consistent with Third War sources.
Kept 'Farstrider spacing. Built for them.' because it is the tactical and emotional hinge of Lyriel's death.
Kept Lor'themar's quoted 'official line' diction because he is paraphrasing bureaucracy on purpose, not speaking in his natural register.
Kept 'May the stars keep your road.' untouched as a recurring clue line.
